2199850.name: Fantasy Grounds - FG Fantasy Backgrounds
2199850.description:
FG Fantasy Backgrounds

The Fantasy Backgrounds features images and art produced by Doug Davison using state of the art artificial intelligence from stable-diffusion. Majestic backgrounds that can be used to create fantasy scenes for your adventures. This pack includes the following items:
  • Background images that can be used with existing art pack brushes and tiles
  • Campsites, carriage houses, cemeteries, deserts, huts, enchanted forests, grand halls, swamps, mausoleums, valleys, medieval markets, and more
  • Use these backgrounds to set the scene for roleplaying or combine with NPC images featuring transparency for scene building
These images rely upon the Stable Diffusion license.
License:

Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Doug Davison
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and any ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
